content.shortDescription: An exciting football tournament where teams compete in the GLOBIZZ Cup 2026 at Pondicherry University.
content.description:
GLOBIZZ Cup 2026 brings together the spirit of competition, teamwork, and sportsmanship in an action-packed football tournament as part of GLOBIZZ’26.
Teams will compete for victory in a thrilling showdown where business meets the beautiful game. With limited slots available, participants are encouraged to secure their spot early and showcase their football skills on the field.
Contacts for Registration: Adeeb: +91 8848897917 Jishan: +91 7907735506
Registration Fee: ₹2000

rules.rule: Teams must complete registration before the event
Participants must follow tournament rules and fair play guidelines
Contact organizers for registration and event details
